data.title: REG - Weir Group PLC - Director/PDMR Shareholding
data.description:
RNS Number : 9016E Weir Group PLC 14 April 2025  

14 April 2025

The Weir Group PLC

Notification of Transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities ("PDMRs") and Persons Closely Associated with them

The Weir Group PLC (the "Company") hereby announces that on 10 April 2025, the PDMRs noted below were granted restricted share awards under The Weir Group Share Reward Plan.

This notification relates to a transaction notified in accordance with the Market Abuse Regulation, further details below:

1.

Details of the person discharging managerial responsibilities/ person closely associated

a)

Name

Jon Stanton

2.

Reason for the notification

a)

Position/status

Chief Executive Officer

b)

Initial notification/ Amendment

Initial Notification

3.

Details of the issuer, emission allowance market participant, auction platform, auctioneer or auction monitor

a)

Name

The Weir Group PLC

b)

LEI

549300KDR56WHY9I3D10

4.

Details of the transaction(s): section to be repeated for (i) each type of instrument; (ii) each type of transaction; (iii) each date; (iv) each place where transactions have been conducted

a)

Description of the financial instrument, type of instrument

                      Identification code

Ordinary shares of 12.5p each fully paid

GB0009465807

b)

Nature of the transaction

Grant of Restricted Share Award under The Weir Group Share Reward Plan. The award will vest in a single tranche on 10 April 2028.

Following vesting there is a requirement to retain the vested shares (except for any shares sold to cover any applicable tax withholding requirement) for a period of two additional years.

During this time the PDMR is not entitled to sell the shares or otherwise deal with them. The Award is not subject to performance conditions.

No consideration was paid for the grant of the award.

data.title: Shanghai Smart Control Plans to Repurchase Up to 40 Million Yuan of Shares
data.description:
Shanghai Smart Control is planning to buy back between 30 million yuan and 40 million yuan of its shares via centralized bidding.

The shares will be repurchased at up to 36.53 yuan each within 12 months from shareholder approval, according to a Monday filing with the Shenzhen bourse.

Shares of the smart vehicle electrical control system manufacturer closed 3% higher Monday.

data.title: NOD - Notice of Nordic Semiconductor's Annual General Meeting 2025
data.description:
April 14, 2025 - The Annual General Meeting of Nordic Semiconductor ASA willbeheld on Monday, May 5, 2025 at 10:00 am CEST.

The meeting will be conducted as a digital meeting only, with no physicalattendance for shareholders. The shareholders will be able to ask questions,andvotes can be submitted from smartphones, tablets or desktop devices. Forfurtherinformation regarding electronic participation, please refer to the guide tobefound at nordicsemi.com/AGM2025. The deadline for registration of advancevotesand proxies is April 30, 2025 at 4:00 pm CEST.

The notice including agenda for the General Meeting is attached to thisdisclosure. The Notice is posted electronically or by mail to all shareholderswith known addresses. All documents regarding the Annual General Meeting areavailable at: https://www.nordicsemi.com/AGM2025.

This information is subject to disclosure under the Norwegian Securities Actsection §5-12

data.title: Power traded on Alpex's DAM falls 25.4% y/y in March
data.description:
TIRANA (Albania), April 14 (SeeNews) - Electricity traded on the day-ahead market of the Kosovo-Albanian power exchange, the Alpex, amounted to 96 GWh in March, a drop from the 128.6 GWh traded in the same month of last year, Alpex said on Monday.

The value of transactions increased 13% on the year, to 10.4 million euro ($11.84 million), Alpex said in a monthly report.

In March, the Albanian bidding zone traded 58.1 GWh of electricity, while the Kosovo bidding zone traded 50.4 GWh. The amounts traded in each of the two zones include double-counting of cross-border trades.

An average market clearing price of 108.79 euro per megawatt hour was achieved for both zones.

Alpex, founded by power transmission operators OST of Albania and KOSTT of Kosovo in October 2020, has a total of 37 members in its bidding zones, according to the corporate website.

Trading in the Albanian zone began in April 2023, whereas the first auction in Kosovo, which also kicked off trade in the inter-zone exchange, was held on January 31, 2024 for electricity delivered on February 1.

($ = 0.877 euro)

data.title: Methanol prices tumble in Europe
data.description: Last week, methanol prices journeyed southward in the European region.An industry source in Europe, on condition of anonymity, informed a Polymerupdate team member, " The European methanol market is currently experiencing significant downward pressure on prices, primarily due to a marked rise in regional supply. The restart of operations at major methanol production facilities has resulted in an influx of availability, leading to a saturated market. Additionally, the recent drop in natural gas prices�a vital feedstock for methanol production�has lowered production costs for manufacturers. This situation has allowed producers to offer methanol at more competitive prices, heightening price competition throughout the region. On the demand front, downstream industries such as formaldehyde and methyl tert-butyl ether (MTBE) production have exhibited weaker-than-expected demand, further contributing to the negative market sentiment. The interplay of oversupply and sluggish demand has led to a significant price correction across European methanol hubs. The source added, "Moreover, logistical challenges have compounded the situation, as demand has remained low partly due to persistently low water levels in the Rhine River. These low levels have increased freight costs and limited barge capacities, impeding the transportation of bulk quantities. A producer previously indicated that large buyers were unable to fully capitalize on low spot prices due to these logistical constraints. A participant in the European market confirmed that conditions on the Rhine had not improved and were reportedly worsening. Consequently, no significant changes in market supply dynamics have been observed, with inventories at key European storage terminals nearing full capacity. With supply remaining plentiful and demand under pressure, the short-term outlook for methanol pricing appears bearish. Market participants are encouraged to closely monitor changes in supply-side conditions, trends in feedstock pricing, and activity in downstream sectors, as these factors will be crucial in determining the future direction of the methanol market in the upcoming weeks.On Friday, methanol prices were assessed at the Euro 290-291/mt FOB Rotterdam levels, a sharp week on week decline of Euro (-24/mt).Meanwhile in Asia, methanol prices on Friday were assessed at the USD 262-264/mt CFR China levels, a decrease of USD (-18/mt) from last week.

data.title: Lionco Pharmaceutical Group Passes Drug Consistency Evaluation for Anesthesia Adjunct Drug
data.description:
Lionco Pharmaceutical Group subsidiary Meilan SmithKline passed the generic drug consistency evaluation for its vecuronium bromide injection.

The drug is used as an adjunct to general anesthesia, according to a Saturday filing with the Shanghai bourse.

Shares of the pharmaceutical company closed 5% higher Monday.

data.title: Webull set for strong run after 10% gain in Nasdaq debut
data.description:
** Trading platform Webull's (BULL.O) shares jump 137.8% to $31.51 in premarket trading

** BULL closed up 10.2% at $13.25 on Friday in Nasdaq debut after completing merger with blank-check firm SK Growth Opportunities Corporation

** About 3.9 million BULL shares changed hands on Friday, per data compiled by LSEG

** BULL has ~471.1 million outstanding shares for $6.24 billion market cap as of last close, per LSEG

** Founded in 2016 by Alibaba veteran Anquan Wang, BULL's trading platform allows users to invest in stocks, exchange traded funds, cryptocurrencies and more

** BULL launched in the U.S. in 2018 and has since expanded to 15 regions covering Asia Pacific, Europe and Latin America

** St. Petersburg, Florida-based BULL caters to more than 23 million users globally

data.title: Rapeseed Hits 6-week High
data.description: Rapeseed increased to a 6-week high of 528.50 EUR/T. Over the past 4 weeks, Rapeseed gained 13.17%, and in the last 12 months, it increased 14.46%.
